strengths: 10+ years full-stack experience across TS/Node and React, well exceeding the 6+ requirement
Current role at re:cinq includes AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators, matching the AI agent development requirement
Strong testing/craftsmanship background: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, plus authored a D testing library and test runner
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience listed in resume or stack
Kotlin not mentioned; Java experience is older (robotic arms at Altom, pre-2018)
Limited explicit cloud/Kubernetes depth beyond AWS CDK at Optilyz and self-hosted k8s for GISCollective; no GCP/Azure

key_factors.factor: AI agent / MCP experience at current role
Missing Nest.js and recent Kotlin experience

response.justification: Candidate clearly meets the core fullstack competency with 10+ years across TypeScript, Node.js, React, and MongoDB (Optilyz, RIDE, WatchUp), exceeding the 6+ year bar. AI-agent competency is directly evidenced by current re:cinq work on MCP code generators and agentic frameworks. Testing expertise is strong: TDD practitioner who authored Fluent-Asserts and Trial. Gaps are Nest.js (not mentioned), current Kotlin (Java experience is dated), and limited explicit cloud breadth beyond AWS CDK. Overall a strong fit with learnable gaps in framework specifics.
